title: Immigrate with a start-up visa: About the process - Canada.ca
content:
## Immigrate with a start-up visa: About the process

## Immigrate with a start-up visa
As of January 1, 2026, the Start-Up Visa Program is paused.
We’ll stop accepting commitment certificates from organizations after December 31, 2025.
Applicants with a valid 2025 commitment certificate must apply by June 30, 2026.
Canada’s Start-up Visa Program targets immigrant entrepreneurs with the skills and potential to build
            businesses in Canada that:
- can create jobs for Canadians
- can compete on a global scale
With a valid 2025 commitment certificate Open until June 30, 2026
Without a commitment certificate Paused
We couldn’t load the data. Try again.
From $2,495 increased April 30, 2026
